name: Microwave Italian Stuffed Peppers;;xmxx58b
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve peppers lengthwise. Discard seeds and membranes.
2. Arrange cut side up in a 12 x 8 x 2 inch microwave-safe dish. Cover with plastic wrap, vented.
3. Cook on high for 4-5 minutes.
4. Drain. Season with salt. Set aside.
5. In a 2 quart microwave-safe casserole, cook beef, onion, and garlic, uncovered on high for 4-5 minutes, or until done - stirring twice to break up meat.
6. Drain. Stir in tomatoes, olives, tomato paste, chili powder, sugar, and salt.
7. Stir in rice cereal. Spoon mixture into pepper halves.
8. Wrap pepper halves singly in moisture-proof and vapor proof wrap. Seal, label and freeze up to 2 months.
9. To heat, unwrap a pepper half and place in a microwave-safe individual casserole. Cover with plastic wrap vented.
10. Cook on 70% power (medium-high) for 4 minutes.
11. Uncover. Cook on 50% (medium) for 5-7 minutes or until heated through, giving dish a half turn once.
12. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon shredded cheese. Cook on medium for 30-60 seconds. Let stand covered, 3 minutes.
